highlights.text: My general lean is ES can try to backtest this with 6854, 6878 en route.” We saw exactly this, running to 6878, then 6960+ Friday to end the week.
I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “In summary for Monday: My lean is to defer to the trend.
The cause was the same thing that causes every single long in ES: My core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
They firstly wait for a vertical, elevator down sell.
I wrote Thursday at 4pm: “Below there one very obvious trade is a Failed Breakdown of the December 17th 6773 low.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.
What was the initial target for this rally?
7006 is a big magnet.” Today we dipped under 6935-40, trapped shorts again, then rippd to 6998 exact by noon.

post_title: The February Crash Was Totally Bought In SPX. Are All Time Highs Ahead? February 10th Plan
